query:
CREATE TABLE `qumus_core_policies` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `policy_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `policy_type` enum('recommendation_engine','payment_processing','content_moderation','user_registration','subscription_management','performance_alert','analytics_aggregation','compliance_reporting') NOT NULL,
  `autonomy_level` int NOT NULL,
  `confidence_threshold` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 80,
  `enabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `priority` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `conditions` json,
  `actions` json,
  `escalation_rules` json,
  `metadata` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `qumus_core_policies_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `qumus_core_policies_policy_id_unique` UNIQUE(`policy_id`)
);
